title: The Fog
content:
Out of the lamp-bestarred and clouded dusk - 
    Snaring, illuding, concealing,
    Magically conjuring - 
    Turning to fairy-coaches
    Beetle-backed limousines
    Scampering under the great Arch - 
    Making a decoy of blue overalls
    And mystery of a scarlet shawl - 
    Indolently - 
    Knowing no impediment of its sure advance - 
    Descends the fog.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Lola Ridge, titled "The Fog", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
